name: recall-process-lambda
description: Recall process Lambda — S3 trigger -> extract -> chunk -> embed -> Pinecone

scripts.zip: rm -f function.zip && zip -r function.zip index.js lib package.json node_modules

_note: The @aws-sdk/* packages are NOT listed here on purpose — the Node.js 20.x Lambda runtime already provides them, so bundling them would just bloat the zip. Only pdf-parse needs to ship in the deployment package.
